name: takode-panel-prototype
description: Minimal VS Code prototype that renders the existing Takode localhost frontend in a webview panel.

takodePrototype.productionBaseUrl.description: Takode production/server URL to render in the default panel. In Remote SSH, localhost is resolved on the workspace machine via VS Code's forwarded URI handling.

takodePrototype.devBaseUrl.description: Takode dev server URL to render in the dev panel. In Remote SSH, localhost is resolved on the workspace machine via VS Code's forwarded URI handling.

takodePrototype.retainContextWhenHidden.description: Keep the Takode iframe alive when the panel is hidden so the existing web app can retain its in-memory UI state.
